title: Fix Excel export filename to use proper project name

requirements.summary: Update ExportButton component to generate CSV filename as 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' using the proper project name with underscores and current date
acceptanceCriteria: Downloaded CSV file is named 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_YYYY-MM-DD.csv' with the current date
Filename uses underscores instead of spaces
Filename reflects the proper project name 'Pilot Flight Logbook'
Export functionality continues to work without errors

file_operations.description: Update the filename generation logic in the handleExport function to use 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook' as the base name and format the date as YYYY-MM-DD. Replace the current filename string with a format that constructs 'Pilot_Flight_Logbook_' + current date in YYYY-MM-DD format + '.csv'. Ensure the date formatting uses padded values (e.g., '2024-01-05' not '2024-1-5').
